title: row-value updates in triggers do not work.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_t1(a integer, b integer, c integer);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_fuzz_t1() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN UPDATE fuzz_t1 SET a = 4, b = 5, c = 6;
key_bug_features: Row-value UPDATE statements inside of TRIGGERs
